question: According to the chart, which statement about the latest year is most appropriate?

options.A: The latest year clearly marks a permanent decline in copies sold.
options.B: The latest year shows a sharp drop in copies sold compared to previous years.
options.C: The latest year has the highest copies sold in the entire period shown.
options.D: No firm conclusion about the latest year’s full-year performance can be drawn from this partial-year data.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 5 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (1,007 copies) directly to full-year values like 2,385 copies creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
